description_long: This object is a classic shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel made of metal, likely steel, with a smooth, dark finish. The stock is constructed from dark brown wood, shaped ergonomically for shoulder support, and extends into a robust grip area. The receiver, where the barrel meets the stock, is metallic and houses the trigger mechanism, which is protected by a rounded metal trigger guard. The shotgun has a single barrel configuration, with no visible ribbing or venting along the top. The overall design is streamlined and functional, with no visible external magazine or pump mechanism. The finish is sleek, with a combination of wood grain and polished metal surfaces.
description: A classic single-barrel shotgun with a dark wooden stock and a long, smooth metal barrel. The design is streamlined, featuring a rounded trigger guard and no visible pump or lever.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the dark wooden stock, long metal barrel, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular barrel opening and the slim profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side but with the same key features: wooden stock, long barrel, and metallic receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metal guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
